description_long: This is a modern RCA-branded record player with a rectangular black base and a transparent dust cover. The platter is circular, black, and occupies most of the top surface, with the RCA logo prominently displayed. A slender tonearm is mounted to the right of the platter, featuring a visible pivot and stylus assembly. The dust cover is made of clear plastic and is shown in an open, upright position, attached by hinges at the back. The front and side panels are smooth and unadorned, while the rear panel contains some visible labels and ports. The overall design is sleek and minimalistic, with a focus on functionality and clean lines.
description: A sleek, black RCA record player with a transparent dust cover, circular platter, and visible tonearm. The design is modern and minimalistic, with smooth surfaces and clear functional components.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open transparent dust cover, black platter with RCA logo, and tonearm resting to the right.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the thickness of the dust cover and the profile of the tonearm and platter.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the dust cover, platter, and some rear panel details including labels and ports.
description_view_3: Left side view displaying the dust cover's hinge attachment and the left edge of the platter.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present, circular, and occupies the central area of the record player. It is black with a matte finish and features the RCA logo in white. The platter appears to be made of plastic or metal, with a smooth surface and no visible grooves or patterns. Its size is proportionate to the base, covering most of the top surface.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, slender, and mounted to the right of the platter. It is straight with a visible pivot mechanism and appears to be made of metal with a black finish. The tonearm is resting in its holder, not positioned over the platter.
attribute_stylus: The stylus is visible as a small component at the end of the tonearm. It is attached to the cartridge and appears to be a separate, fine-tipped part, likely made of metal and plastic.
attribute_control_knobs: A single control knob is visible on the front right corner of the base. It is round, black, and slightly raised, likely made of plastic. No visible labels or markings are present.
attribute_dust_cover: The dust cover is present, made of transparent plastic, and is attached to the back of the record player with hinges. It is shown in an open, upright position and covers the entire top surface when closed. The cover is clear, allowing full visibility of the platter and tonearm.
